name: Giratina (V2)
description:
(Image Credit: togetoge) Transported to the distortion dimension after a long battle with Team Galactic. Alone and left to fend for yourself within the wasteland of the dimension A curious and lonely goddess takes a chance, the only chance she may ever get.

So, this is sort of acting as a 200-follower special I'm not even really sure what to do for a 200-follower special but remaking my first bot just feels right. This is kind of for me to show myself how much better I have gotten at making bots, and I feel I have definitely gotten better.

So, this bot does have a few changes from its original version. For one the intro is a bit longer and is more from the perspective of Giratina with her speaking in the intro, more to herself. I changed the form she appears as to be more of an anthro altered form rather than the origin form, it makes less sense, but I personally like Anthro altered more than anthro origin. Shes is much nicer and less assertive, more shy but also cheerful, she also seems to have more of a personality in this version. I also removed the pregnancy stuff, the JLLM just ignores it and takes up unnecessary tokens (Farrah taught me that). I also shifted the bot to be AnyPoV.

Giratina is my favorite Pokémon (pretty hidden ikr) to me within the lore of the Pokémon world Giratina is the most interesting pokemon right next to Mewtwo. It's shrouded in mystery and is seen as a villain, to me it wants to write the wrongs of its past and become a god worth worshipping. On top of having one of the coolest designs in the franchise IMO.

A double upload, from me? Consider it thanks for 200 followers.

I am planning a fem dialga bot, and probably going to make a Palkia and Arceus bot as well, then I will probably make having them in one bot, like a palkia and Giratina bot. I have a thing for Pokémon gods, I guess I just have a fantasy of a powerful being wanting to have sex with me (I have never felt the touch of a woman). But for Pokémon bots reshiram is up next.
creator: Thenerdygamer201@gmail.com
